name: Property
short_description: Property is a first person horror online game, killer is hunting survivors on different randomly generated environments.
detailed_description:
Property
is a first person horror online game. Group of people have entered to an restricted area where they meet something unexpected.

Gameplay
1 player is randomly chosen to be a killer and all others as survivors, survivors must escape the area before the killer finds them.

Environments
Different maps you can choose to play. Maps are randomly generated every time so nobody can learn the layout before the game.

Online
Hosting
- online matches
- passworded
- max players up to 10
- host specific map
- play against AI killer while waiting online players

Searching other games
- server list for finding games

Controls
Keyboard and mouse + invert settings
